notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the skopeo SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 37 CVEs: CVE-2021-36221, CVE-2021-41190, CVE-2022-1705, CVE-2022-1708, CVE-2022-1962, and 32 more.
notes.title: Description
